text.title: subagent-as-context-firewall Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for subagent-as-context-firewall as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Subagent returns 50K tokens of everything it found
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hard cap output at 500 tokens; force the schema to be summary plus refs only

failure-mode.description: Parent re-passes the subagent output to ANOTHER subagent without slimming
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each subagent boundary should slim, not preserve, the previous content

failure-mode.description: Spawn a subagent for a 1-file question
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Diminishing returns; subagent overhead greater than main reading the file

failure-mode.description: Multiple subagents share state via shared context
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Defeats firewall use shared FILES instead

failure-mode.description: Subagent crashes or timeouts swallow the parent question
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always return some result with confidence: low rather than nothing
